transitions.name: initiate_deployment
transitions.description: Start the process of deploying a new environment.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment is currently being processed.

process.name: initiate_deployment_process
process.description: This process initiates the deployment by calling appropriate API.

transitions.name: complete_deployment
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment has been completed successfully.

process.name: complete_deployment_process
process.description: Finalizes the deployment, handling success or failure.

transitions.name: cancel_deployment
transitions.start_state_description: The deployment is currently in progress.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment was canceled by the user.

process.name: cancel_deployment_process
process.description: Handles cancellation of a deployment request.

transitions.name: check_status
transitions.description: Check the current status of a deployment.
transitions.end_state_description: The deployment status has been checked.

process.name: check_status_process
process.description: Retrieves the current status of a deployment.
